question: According to the chart, how does the number of visitors at Station Y compare to Station X in Week 3?

options.A: Station Y has about 1.1 times as many visitors as Station X
options.B: Station Y has about 1.5 times as many visitors as Station X
options.C: Station Y has about twice as many visitors as Station X
options.D: Station Y has about three times as many visitors as Station X

explanation: The y-axis starts at 1500 instead of 0, which compresses the visible differences between stacked totals. That can make Station X look as large as (or larger than) Station Y even though the totals favor Station Y.
